videos.title: The American Birkebeiner cross-country ski race
videos.description:
Since it was first held 50 years ago, the American Birkebeiner, a trek of more than 30 miles through the Northwoods of Wisconsin, modeled after a fabled bit of Norwegian history, has become the largest cross-country ski race in the U.S. Correspondent Conor Knighton reports on how enthusiasm for the festival of events surrounding the race (dubbed "Birke fever") has snowballed.
#Birkebeiner #crosscountryski 

"CBS Sunday Morning" features stories on the arts, music, nature, entertainment, sports, history, science and Americana, and highlights unique human accomplishments and achievements. Check local listings for CBS Sunday Morning broadcast times.

videos.title: De Zolt & Cross-Country Skiing Relay - Part 5 - The Lillehammer 1994 Olympic Film | Olympic History
videos.description:
📲 Subscribe to @olympics: http://oly.ch/Subscribe 

 In part 5 of our coverage of the 1994 Winter Olympic Games Maurilio De Zolt and his Italian relay team look to cause an upset and defeat the host nation in the Cross Country Skiing. We also see Great Britain's Jayne Torvill and Christopher Dean return to the ice 10 years on from their initial Olympic success, as we continue the official Olympic film of the Lillehammer Games.

videos.title: 2021 Slumberland American Birkebeiner - Classic Race
videos.description:
Over the course of the year you’ve been hearing from CXC Academy guest coaches and advisors Ian Torchia, Matt Liebsch and Caitlin Gregg. Now watch their world class skiing in the largest and one of the longest cross-country ski race in North America.

Enjoy exclusive race footage from the 2021 Slumberland American Birkebeiner. Action video commentary by Dennis Kruse.

videos.title: Vasaloppet Visma Ski Classics 2019
videos.description:
Vasaloppet started in 1922, but really it is much older than that. The first Vasalopp was carried out as early as 1521 by Gustav Eriksson. During his flight from the Danish king he stopped in Sälen and returned to Mora to lead the uprising against the occupation forces. Gustav Eriksson eventually united the realm and became Sweden’s first king, better known under the name Gustav Vasa. In other words, Sälen is not only the starting point for the world’s largest exercise race; it is also the starting point for the history of our whole country.
#16000человек собрались проехать на лыжах дистанцию в 90км от Салена до Моры #Vasa #vasaloppet #crosscountryski #ski #skimarathon #васалоппет #васалопет #васа #лыжи #лыжныймарафон #visma #vismaskiclassics #🎿 #Sweeden #mora #salen #vasaloppet2019 #worldloppet #skiclassics

videos.title: The Grand Traverse | A race Story from Crested Butte to Aspen
videos.description:
Lines aren’t easily drawn between the iconic, contrasting ski towns of Crested Butte and Aspen. But one thread has held strong: The Grand Traverse—a point-to-point ski race that links the towns through the Elk Mountains that sit between them.
 
Rounding on its 25th year in 2023, The Grand Traverse has been a premier ski mountaineering event in Colorado since its inception. Today, top competitors cover the 40-mile distance, climbing more than 6,800 feet along the way, within six hours. While fast times are the goal for some, 10 frostbite-less digits and reaching the finish line is the achievement for others.
 
Regardless of how it ends, competitors are left with a sense of accomplishment. In this short film, “The Grand Traverse,”directed by Mike Rogge and Verb Cabin, watch as 165 teams, with Aspen in their sights, endeavor to go the distance.

Presented by Montane 

@montaneofficial   

With additional support from Voile, Fly Low, C.A.M.P. USA, DirtBag Bar, Crested Butte Nordic and Backcountry Magazine

@voilemfg    @flylowgear    @BackcountryMagazine    @The Grand Traverse
